title: Senior Plant Manager at Procter & Gamble India

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Procter & Gamble India
jsonLd.description:
Procter & Gamble India has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Procter & Gamble India:
Procter & Gamble India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Procter & Gamble India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
